goal_text: 继续把 Agent Studio 提升到 98%
current_state: Agent Orchestrator has event-first queue foundation, guarded parallel 2 execution, doctor diagnostics, router rules, and integration validation.
target_state: Agent Studio can turn a natural-language goal into reviewed REQ, TECH, task queue, dispatch plan, validation plan, and approval-gated autonomous execution.

capability_scores.name: Goal Engine
evidence: No committed goal schema before V3 planning
capability_scores.gap_summary: Need structured goal state, gap analysis, milestones, and recommended tasks.

capability_scores.name: Planner Agent
evidence: Manual REQ / TECH / task-queue generation exists
capability_scores.gap_summary: Need structured planner output that can create REQ, TECH, queue drafts, dispatch plans, and validation plans.

capability_scores.name: Agent Registry
evidence: agent-1 to agent-5 lanes are documented
capability_scores.gap_summary: Need registry-backed dynamic agent pool metadata instead of hard-coded assumptions.

capability_scores.name: Autonomous Loop V1
capability_scores.gap_summary: Need goal-aware daemon planning loop that stops for human approval before execution.

gaps.impact: The platform cannot consistently track goal progress or required maturity gaps.

gaps.summary: Planner output is not yet machine-readable.
gaps.impact: REQ, TECH, task queue, dispatch plan, and validation plan are still manually assembled.

gaps.summary: Agent pool metadata is still router-rule first.
gaps.impact: New agents or paused agents cannot be represented without updating static routing assumptions.

gaps.summary: No validation matrix for Goal / Planner / Registry artifacts.
gaps.impact: Generated planning output cannot be accepted safely without repeatable checks.

milestones.title: Approval-gated goal loop planned
exit_criteria: Daemon loop plan includes human approval boundary
Validation matrix covers goal, planner, registry, and queue artifacts
Generated tasks can be routed through registry or router rules

recommended_tasks.title: Goal Engine architecture and schema
recommended_tasks.expected_output: Goal Engine architecture, schema review, and gap-analysis contract

recommended_tasks.title: Planner output schema and planning runtime flow
recommended_tasks.expected_output: Planner output schema usage and dry-run planning flow

recommended_tasks.title: Agent Registry and dynamic Agent Pool design
recommended_tasks.expected_output: Agent Registry design and router compatibility mapping

risks.summary: A goal-driven loop could accidentally look like unattended execution.
risks.mitigation: Keep V3 Autonomous Loop V1 approval-gated and dry-run first.

risks.summary: Generated tasks may propose high-risk business or production paths.
risks.mitigation: Require router/registry path checks and human approval for high-risk scope.
